subcodes.first_line: O essence of all things! Hearken unto My Call, that perchance ye may find a path unto God. Purify your souls from desire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا کلشیء ان استمعوا ندائی لعل تجدن الی الله سبیل طهروا نفوسکم عن الهوی
subcodes.subjects: @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @chastisement and requital, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @unity; oneness of humanity, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @contention and conflict
